provisions.title: Short title and commencement.
provisions.content: (1) This Act may be called the Cutchi Memons Act, 1938. (2) It shall come into force on the 1st day of November, 1938.

provisions.title: Cutchi Memons to be governed in certain matters by Muhammadan Law.
provisions.content: Subject to the provisions of section 3, all Cutchi Memons shall, in matters of succession and inheritance, be governed by the Muhammadan Law.

provisions.title: Savings.
provisions.content: Nothing in this Act shall affect any right or liability acquired or incurred before its commencement, or any legal proceeding or remedy in respect of any such right or liability; and any such legal proceeding or remedy may be continued or enforced as if this Act had not been passed.

provisions.title: Repealed.
provisions.content: [Repealed.]--Rep. by the Repealing and Amending Act, 1942 (25 of 1942), s. 2 and the First Schedule (w.e.f. 1-10-1942).
